title: Rerun SUCO champion timeline report
description: Rerun the ScoreChampionVersionTimeline report for SUCO Home Improvement after new champion promotions.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Reran ScoreChampionVersionTimeline for scorecard key suco_home_improvement over the last 21 days with --fresh and IAM auth. Result: Report 2dab2284-9cc6-4e76-801a-c89a8b4b571e, block 4f179f22-e7a8-4096-b148-31b461a4645a.
